creator: tmseck@web.de
text:
Unbreak HTTPS on IPv4-only systems by adding a trimmed version of the vendor
patch for Squid bug #3011 (changeset 10063) as a local patch.
See http://bugs.squid-cache.org/show_bug.cgi?id=3011 for further details.

Added file:

files/patch-changeset_10063

Fix: Apply this patch:
